recommendations.title: He's Worse than Me
recommendations.overview: Two reckless friends Leonardo (Adriano Celentano) and Luciano (Renato Potstsetto) are just doing whatever they want and getting into endless alterations. When one of them decides to marry, their friendship is in a crisis ...

recommendations.title: Nineties
recommendations.overview: Scandalously famous collections of short Italian comedies of the 90s! All that was "fun" in those years in Italy - all here! The sea of black humor on all issues - sex, politics, mafia, crime, TV...

recommendations.title: Christmas Vacation '91
recommendations.overview: This coarse bedroom farce takes place at the St. Moritz ski resort over a Christmas vacation. Among the couples whose lives intersect are a widowed artist honeymooning with his second wife, a gay man traveling with his son and his lover (and hiding e

recommendations.title: La fidanzata di papà
recommendations.overview: Barbara and Matteo are two Italians who live in Miami, managing a small restaurant overlooking the sea. Barbara is pregnant and the happy event brings their respective parents together in Miami: Massimo, Matteo's father, who has recently become a wid

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.

recommendations.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Ebenezer Scrooge is far too greedy to understand that Christmas is a time for kindness and generosity. But with the guidance of some new found friends, Scrooge learns to embrace the spirit of the season. A retelling of the classic Dickens tale with D

recommendations.title: A Charlie Brown Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Charlie Brown complains about the overwhelming materialism that he sees amongst everyone during the Christmas season, Lucy suggests that he become director of the school Christmas pageant. Charlie Brown accepts, but it is a frustrating struggle.

recommendations.title: Violent Night
recommendations.overview: When a team of mercenaries breaks into a wealthy family compound on Christmas Eve, taking everyone inside hostage, the team isn’t prepared for a surprise combatant: Santa Claus is on the grounds, and he’s about to show why this Nick is no saint.

recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.

recommendations.title: Love Hard
recommendations.overview: An LA girl, unlucky in love, falls for an East Coast guy on a dating app and decides to surprise him for Christmas, only to discover that she's been catfished. But the object of her affection actually lives in the same town, and the guy who duped her
